user.title: Authentication with SunPower Maxeon
user.description: Connect your SunPower Maxeon account to Home Assistant to retrieve system data.

reauth_confirm.title: Authentication Required
reauth_confirm.description: Please reauthenticate to continue using the SunPower Maxeon integration.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the SunPower Maxeon API.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of the SunPower Maxeon integration is allowed.

charging.title: Charging Schedule
charging.description: Configure when the battery should charge and set a maximum charge limit.

discharging.title: Discharging Schedule
discharging.description: Configure when the battery should discharge and set a min residual charge limit.

export.title: Export Limit
export.description: Configure the maximum amount of power your system is allowed to export to the grid.

ups.title: UPS Mode
ups.description: Enable or disable UPS mode, which keeps the battery ready for backup use.

remote_dispatch.name: Remote battery dispatch
remote_dispatch.description: Send a one-off remote dispatch command that controls how the battery charges or discharges, e.g. to take advantage of a free-power window from your energy provider.

enable.name: Enable
enable.description: Turn the dispatch command on. Disable to cancel an in-progress dispatch.

control_mode.name: Control mode
control_mode.description:
How the battery should behave during the dispatch window:
- **PV only charge**: battery charges only from solar PV.
- **Forced charge / discharge**: forces charge or discharge at the given Power, stopping at Target state of charge.
- **Load following**: battery output follows home consumption.
- **Optimise consumption**: PV charges the battery first; grid tops up charging only if PV can't meet the target Power.
- **Maximise consumption**: PV is bypassed, battery charges only from the grid.
- **No battery charge**: charging is disabled for the dispatch window.

duration_minutes.name: Duration (minutes)
duration_minutes.description: How long the dispatch command should run for.

power.name: Power (W)
power.description: Target charge/discharge power. Required by the API for PV only charge and Forced charge/discharge modes; ignored for the others.

target_soc.name: Target state of charge (%)
target_soc.description: Battery SOC at which charging/discharging stops. Required by the API for Forced charge/discharge mode; ignored for the others.

enable_pv.name: Allow PV
enable_pv.description: Allow solar production to contribute during the dispatch window.
